title: ProtectData
description: `protect <target> [<level>]` — set a skill's or channel's protection level. **INFERRED.**

applied.description: `true` on the `--yes` apply, `false` on the describe.

audience.description:
The audience this protection governs: the reach (people) for a skill, the member count for a
channel.

loosening.description: `true` when the level LOOSENS protection (`open`) — the owner-gated direction.

note.description: A standing note the describe carries (e.g. "pending proposals survive a loosening").
